title: Content Digests, Near-Duplicate Evidence, Change Classes, and History · Runtime Contract: Change Types
summary: Canonical URLs, byte hashes, text similarity, DOM structure, and latest records are collapsed into one destructive duplicate decision. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go change types increment in multi-stage versioned content evidence store. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, cau…
objectives: Classify content, template, metadata, accessibility, redirect, policy, parser, disappearance, and restoration changes.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-change-types-7ahpo4(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_change_types_7ahpo4\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?observationCases < 18)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?classifiedCases < 17 \|\| classifiedCases > observationCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?changedVersions < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?falseMerges > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using classify and content plus specific case evidence.
